exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your yoga practice forward
items: Complete a comprehensive body assessment by testing your baseline flexibility, strength, and balance in 10 foundational yoga poses
Assess your current physical limitations and create a list of any injuries, health conditions, or mobility restrictions to discuss with instructors
Establish a consistent daily practice space in your home by clearing and dedicating a specific area for yoga
Purchase essential yoga equipment including a quality mat, blocks, and a strap that fits your budget and practice needs
Document your baseline flexibility and strength by recording yourself performing basic movements like forward folds, twists, and balance poses
Schedule a one-on-one consultation with a qualified yoga instructor to discuss your goals, limitations, and create a personalized practice plan
